reviews.text: I am nearly 80 years old so I’ve seen more than a few medical providers over the years.  Terrilee is one of the best.  My wife and I travel over an hour each way to see her. reviews.text:
Buyer BEWARE!! IT'S ONE THING IF YOU GET A COUPLE REVIEWS THAT AREN'T SO GOOD BUT WHEN YOU'VE GOT PAGES OF PEOPLE SAYING THE SAME THING.. PEOPLE BETTER START PAYING ATTENTION.
I'll change it from the one star once they actually get back to us. For whatever reason almost a year ago they charged us a prepayment of nearly $3,000 on our credit card for services and product. We've called and left messages for appointments and my husband even went in and signed a release so that way they could talk to me however they can't find the release and they haven't tried to make it right any which way. He had maybe three appointments back in January and they told him that the product they have sometimes doesn't work for people and he must be one of them. After that they never call back.  The appointments they did have In the books, they rescheduled.

If we don't hear back from them soon we will start a charge back on our credit card for failure to provide service and product. Take note. I won't go away and i've fought much bigger battles.

reviews.name: places/ChIJNxe4OvM34ocRhxr8wMU-wJU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2sxWlJrVm5WbE4yZVV4Wk5HMVRZVGhRZUdGRU1rRRAB
reviews.text: This place has the worst customer service I've ever dealt with. They do not follow up with what they say they're supposed to do. Ive been scheduled an appointment for a time they're not even open. They dont follow up with lab results like they say they will. I always have to call in. Good luck getting a call back or even an answer when you call. They're only interested in making a sale to get commission. Terrible company. Terrible business. Stay away.

reviews.name: places/ChIJNxe4OvM34ocRhxr8wMU-wJU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21OMFdHZE5iRGx1U2tSaFJrbHNNVWgwWVVONk4xRRAB
reviews.text: Was ok for a year or so… and then raised prices without even so much as a email or text notification.  Then when I realized my account had been double charged an amount that was more than my previous total… they told me that that price wasn’t correct either, but that I shouldn’t say anything because if they saw that mistake… then they would see they were now undercharging me and charge me EVEN more per month.  They also refused to give me a single statement or document pertaining to my account at all.  No financial or medical information has been released and they have complete ignored my emails and requests.  Shady business going on.  If you need T therapy there are better and cheaper alternatives in the QC area with more comprehensive blood work too!

reviews.name: places/ChIJNxe4OvM34ocRhxr8wMU-wJU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURndnIzUFBBEAE
reviews.text:
I’ve been on TRT going on 2 years. It has been life changing for me! Yes, there are some great ppl that work at this location - but it’s not the same without Mike here.  He is very skilled, a veteran and made sure to get you in and out - he was respected by everyone, easy to talk to and made sure everything went smoothly.

Since Mike has left, it’s taken 30 min a visit to get a simple shot. When Mike was around - I’d be in and out within 10 min.

I’m currently looking at other clinics at this time. Sometimes corporate needs to look at the big picture and what/who benefits their paying and loyal customers.

After reading multiple reviews; it seems like Mike was everyone’s favorite.

reviews.name: places/ChIJNxe4OvM34ocRhxr8wMU-wJU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2taS1RsVm5RVFZrUlRBNFUwUnlja2xXTkZSNWFWRRAB
reviews.text: The product itself is fine. The costumer service however, needs work. After several unnecessary 50 mile trips I explained the point of the "drop ship" I was paying extra for. Overall all pretty disappointed.

reviews.text:
IMI is truly amazing. From the moment you walk in, the staff and environment feels warm and welcoming. Dr. Aaron, Dr. Sadie, Heather, Jen, Karmen, they're all amazing!

I walked in without an appointment after getting back from vacation because I had a strained muscle or something in my neck that was making my life miserable. I was in so much pain and honestly desperate for relief. They got me in right away, listened to me, and immediately started treatment—and it WORKED. The relief was real and noticeable, not temporary or brushed off.

What stands out the most is how much they truly care about their patients. You’re not rushed, dismissed, or treated like just another appointment. Their compassion, professionalism, and results speak for themselves. I’m so grateful I walked in that day. IMI has earned my trust completely, and I can’t recommend them enough!

reviews.name: places/ChIJtby_zxf35IcRxL6gNWsSRCw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2psWmQwZDJTblE1ZDJ0bE1ITkNYMlJ5ZUcxeVlWRRAB
reviews.text: I am 57 years old and was feeling all the symptoms of low T. The fatigue, low sex drive and increased body fat were my main concerns. I spoke with Josh about everything i was experiencing and fighting with. He really took the time to listen and assisted with pointing me in the right direction. After reviewing my blood work a meeting was set up with Dr. Staller who went over everything with me in detail about the best way to start getting things on track and for what my goals were. It really feels good to know that you have people on your side and not just be blown off with statements like everything looks good for your age. The best news i can share is that following the protocol and discussing diet and exercise with Josh and Dr. Staller i have gone from 238lbs to 213lbs for a total of 25lbs lost from April 22nd to today June 2nd. I owe a great big thanks to Josh for his attention to detail and for checking in on my progress. It is a great feeling to have my energy and drive back again!

reviews.text: After years of having unanswered questions as to why I was always tired, on edge, low libido, not sleeping, etc. I came across Optimal Hormones. She listened to my symptoms and frustration as well as taking a look into my labs. She developed a plan that was individualized to me. She looked for better options than what I was currently using for supplements as well. After fully being on my plan for almost a month, I am feeling way better. I am experiencing less brain fog and more focus/concentration. I am experiencing a better libido. I am not as on edge and feel way less stressed. I am sleeping through the night and I am motivated and not fatigued during the day. She has checked in with me several times between me starting and now. She demonstrates concern and has an awesome ability to listen and put into action a plan that will suit your needs. She is always looking for better options and ways to make the plan better as well.

reviews.name: places/ChIJaRPHa_eF7ocRgWO4y-jGoU4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xKT1ZrUm9TbGwyYUZNeVdGUlpXbFpDU2tzMmQwRRAB
reviews.text: Krista is incredibly kind and attentive. She listened carefully, answered all my questions, and made me feel at ease throughout my visit. She explained every step of my treatment plan clearly and that I understood all options before proceeding. She also checks in often to make sure that everything is going well. Highly recommend!!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJaRPHa_eF7ocRgWO4y-jGoU4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pGS1VtUlZkM2cwWW5NM1VtWjFlbUpHUjFKVmExRRAB
reviews.text: I have struggled for a lot of years with not feeling like my body was my own. I had a lot of doctors telling me everything was good and “normal” even though it didn’t feel like it. When I went to Krista, she listened, she tried to understand my concerns and she didn’t just write me off and try to give me medicines. She tested for things my doctors seemed to ignore and because of this I’m finally on supplements that are right for my body. reviews.text:
Working with Jessica Southard has been a truly life-changing experience. From our very first appointment, I felt genuinely heard, understood, and supported. Jessica has a rare gift. Not only is she incredibly intelligent and knowledgeable in functional medicine, but she also brings warmth, compassion, and patience to every conversation.

I came to her with a complex array of health issues, and instead of being overwhelmed or dismissive, she took the time to listen deeply to my concerns. She asked thoughtful questions, made insightful connections, and helped me navigate a path forward with clarity and confidence. It was clear that she was fully present and genuinely cared about my well-being.

What sets Jessica apart is how much she clearly loves what she does. Her passion for helping others and dedication to her work shines through in every interaction. She doesn’t just treat symptoms, she empowers you with knowledge and tools to take control of your health.

If you’re looking for a practitioner who is not only highly skilled but also kind, attentive, and truly invested in your healing journey, I can’t recommend Jessica Southard enough.

reviews.name: places/ChIJb3I0Y07rMEoR9lA49W7Oun0/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNZdW9HMDd3RRAB
reviews.text:
A Life-Changing Experience at Functional Medicine of Iowa
My relief from Autoimmune Symptoms Without Harsh Pharmaceuticals
I cannot express enough how grateful I am to have found Functional Medicine of Iowa.  After years of battling relentless autoimmune symptoms and enduring the adverse effects of harsh pharmaceuticals, I finally discovered a sanctuary of healing and hope.
I was met with compassion, understanding, and a commitment to truly listen to my health concerns. Functional Medicine of Iowa took the time to understand my unique medical history and the intricacies of my autoimmune condition. Their holistic and patient-centered approach was a breath of fresh air compared to the impersonal and rushed experiences I had previously encountered.
The personalized treatment plan devised for me focused on understanding the body that I live in and how that body respones to my environment and lifestyle choices.  I was educated about the root causes of my symptoms, (which previously had only been treated with pharmaceuticals), and empowered with the knowledge to weigh the momentary choices that constitute my ‘diet and exercise’. The combination of functional medicine and evidence-based practices brought a profound transformation in my well-being.
Within weeks, I noticed a significant reduction in my symptoms. The chronic fatigue, joint pain, and inflammation that were ever present in my life started to fade away. It was nothing short of miraculous to experience such relief without resorting to harsh pharmaceuticals.
Functional Medicine of Iowa, is incredibly knowledgeable, supportive, and genuinely invested in their patients' health journeys. They foster a nurturing environment where I always felt heard and valued. Their dedication to continuous improvement and staying abreast of the latest advancements in functional medicine reassured me that I was in the best hands possible.
Since working with Functional Medicine of Iowa, I have regained my vitality, energy, and optimism, all thanks to compassionate care built on an understanding of my epigenetics.  My quality of life has improved drastically, and I am eternally thankful for their innovative approach to healthcare. If you are struggling with autoimmune symptoms and seeking an alternative to harsh pharmaceuticals, I wholeheartedly recommend Functional Medicine of Iowa.  They have given me a new lease on life, and for that, I am forever grateful.

reviews.text:
I have been happy with IFM since I switched over from UnityPoint. As someone who is passionate about functional health, UnityPoint was not cutting it and constantly gaslighting me during my postpartum period. Dianna welcomed me with open arms and finally let me draw labs like a FULL thyroid panel, my hormones and other essential labs like homocysteine, b12 and vitamin D. While this may seem simple, I truly can't express how thankful I am to have an integrative clinic like IFM now within my care. Kara (one of the co-founders) has also helped me in my care, and I very much appreciate her holistic perspective and expertise.

Also during my time with IFM, I have enjoyed a network spinal session with Dr. Nellie Keys and Alyssa has been wonderful to talk to whenever I get my labs drawn (or IV therapy). Medicine is more than big pharma, and IFM makes patients feel seen and heard.

reviews.name: places/ChIJi0Ns3Ggh7IcRP0mXYuSpsY8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2poNWFsUnNjbXBWYXpKUlNtZFJPWEJRY2xKaU1XYxAB
reviews.text:
I can't say enough great things about this clinic. Every time I walk in, I feel truly heard and supported. The providers take the time to understand me—my concerns, my goals—and make sure my care feels personalized, not like it's coming from a one-size-fits-all textbook. It's so refreshing to feel like a partner in my healthcare, not just a patient.

Big shoutout to Nurse Alyssa, who is always so compassionate and attentive, and Spencer at the front desk, who makes every visit warm and welcoming. Their kindness and professionalism set the tone from the moment you walk in. Grateful to have a care team that actually feels like a team! Thank you IFM.

reviews.name: places/ChIJi0Ns3Ggh7IcRP0mXYuSpsY8/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNYaVlqUlZnEAE
reviews.text:
After years of going to doctor after doctor, explaining concerning symptoms, and then not having those concerns addressed, I was starting to feel like I was in a losing battle.
Then I met Dianna O'Neill!
From the moment she walked me back to her office, I felt like I could finally breathe. She was SO warm and welcoming from the beginning, carefully listening to me explain what I've been dealing with the last several years. She then took the time to walk me through how all of the symptoms I was experiencing are actually all interconnected and CAN be addressed! I left my first appointment with a renewed sense of hope - the first time I had ever experienced that, leaving a medical appointment.
At my follow up appointment two weeks later, she walked me through my blood panel, and came up with a course of action that I felt completely comfortable with.
I have been raving about her since!
If you are searching for someone with excellent medical knowledge (especially in regards to the female body!) and helps you with a kind, compassionate, warm approach, Dianna is absolutely the person for you!

reviews.name: places/ChIJi0Ns3Ggh7IcRP0mXYuSpsY8/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIbHNuMWhRRRAB
reviews.text: I love going to my healthcare providers at Integrative Family Medicine. It’s a nice relaxed office environment and the great staff make you feel comfortable and calm. The little extra time they give you for appointments makes it seem like I’m going to spend time with a friend. The patient portal and website are easy to navigate and when you send a message to your provider they DO answer you back in a timely manner. I see Sarah and she’s very knowledgeable on nutritional supplements and healthy alternatives to medications. (That’s my favorite part)! I’m so happy to be under their care.

reviews.name: places/ChIJi0Ns3Ggh7IcRP0mXYuSpsY8/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VOSzFrUGktcVB6ODN3RRAB
reviews.text:
I was interested in booking a new appointment with your location. However, when you go through your website, one page says that the dr is accepting new patients and then the next page, when you go to select the date, says that she is not accepting new appointments. Then when I call you, I can't get in touch with a human, but am told that I need to send an email.
I know that it is 2025, but this right here, tells me that you will pawn me off to robots, to do your work. I will not be attempting any further to have an appointment with you. If you can't have a human interaction, then why would I think that your office will be any different?
You might want to consider hiring people, instead of farming out the first impression of your clinic to google.

reviews.name: places/ChIJRz4yKBkh7IcRlaVoH1-LvAQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pGR1EwbE9WRFo0TWtac1pGZGpVMVF4U1RSTFozYxAB
reviews.text:
I was quoted $500/month for the full bundle or $195/month for testosterone + support meds. What was not disclosed is that a single shipment (one vial of testosterone, one peptide, tadalafil) was allegedly $1,500, split into multiple $500 charges.

I would never have agreed to this had the total been stated upfront.

For comparison, I now pay less than $1,500 per YEAR for testosterone, peptides, support meds, and regular blood work through other legitimate providers. Charging $1,500 for what amounts to a single cycle, while obscuring the true cost, is blatant price gouging.

Billing was eventually stopped and the final charge refunded, but only after I dug into the charges myself. Get everything in writing before signing up.
